message:
fix(share): deterministic hosting detection via sorted directory entries, tighten S3 signal

hosting.rs: GitHub Pages and S3 hosting detectors now sort directory
entries before scanning, producing deterministic signal ordering
regardless of filesystem readdir order.  S3 detection drops the
git-remote and AWS-env-var heuristics (too noisy) and tightens the
deploy-script signal to require "aws s3" instead of "s3" or "aws"
individually.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
